description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by a lush green lawn and mature trees. The structure features a mix of large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and views of the backyard. The backyard includes a freeform swimming pool and a patio area, ideal for outdoor relaxation and gatherings. The front of the bungalow has a double garage and a driveway, with a landscaped entry path leading to the main entrance. The roof is flat, contributing to a modern, streamlined appearance, and the exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored materials and wood accents. The property is enclosed by a white fence, offering privacy and a sense of enclosure.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio, all surrounded by a white fence and mature landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, and open living spaces with large windows.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, patio, and extensive glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and the side of the garage and house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors facing the backyard
